creator: rick@wzoeterwoude.net
text:
At page http://www.freebsd.org/projects/ the link 'Google Summer of Code 2007' is pointing to the current summer of code page (2008) [1] instead of the archive one at [2]. There is no reference to the 2008 gosc on the project page as well.

[1] http://www.freebsd.org/projects/summerofcode.html
[2] http://www.freebsd.org/projects/summerofcode-2007.html
